variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHR51493 Return Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 168400UH3SLS000V
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHR51493 Return Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 168400UH3SLS000V
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHR51493 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Eppensteiner 168400UH3SLS000V. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHR51493
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 3µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 5µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 152.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 83.4 mm, Length: 427.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 10 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 3µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 10 BAR, Seal: Viton

variants.title: Filtrec R442G03V Return Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 168400UH3SLS000V
variants.option1Value: Filtrec R442G03V Return Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 168400UH3SLS000V
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec R442G03V. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the R442G03V provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
